ham.subject: Transaction Alert: Debit of $1,234.56 on 15/04/2026
ham.body:
Dear John Doe,

We are writing to inform you that a debit transaction of $1,234.56 has been processed on your account ending in 5678 on 15/04/2026 at 03:12 PM UTC. The transaction reference number is 202604151234567890.

If you did not authorize this transaction, please contact us immediately at 1‑800‑123‑4567 or reply to this email.

Thank you for banking with us.

Sincerely,
Customer Support
ABC Bank

spam.subject: Urgent: Immediate Action Required – Zoom Meeting Invite
spam.body:
Dear Team,

This is an urgent invitation to join a mandatory Zoom meeting scheduled for 16/04/2026 at 10:00 AM PST. As the CFO of XYZ Corp, I will be presenting the Q2 financial results and require your presence.

Please click <URL> to join the meeting. The link will expire in 48 hours. If you are unable to attend, please let me know immediately.

Best regards,
Jane Smith
Chief Financial Officer
XYZ Corp
